products.name: iPhone 15 Pro Max (256GB - Blue Titanium)
specs: 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display featuring ProMotion
Titanium with textured matte glass back
A17 Pro chip with 6-core GPU
Pro camera system: 48MP Main | Ultra Wide | Telephoto
USB-C support for USB 3
products.description: The ultimate iPhone model featuring a lightweight titanium design, advanced 5x Telephoto camera, and the blazing fast A17 Pro chip.

products.name: OnePlus 12 (16GB RAM + 512GB - Silky Black)
specs: 6.82-inch 2K Oriental AMOLED display
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 Mobile Platform
50MP Sony LYT-808 main camera with Hasselblad calibration
5400 mAh battery with 100W SUPERVOOC charging
products.description: Equipped with the top-tier Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, Hasselblad mobile camera, and groundbreaking ultra-fast charging.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (5G, 12GB+256GB)
specs: 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with embedded S Pen
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for Galaxy
200MP Quad Telephoto camera with 100x Space Zoom
Galaxy AI features: Live Translate, Circle to Search
products.description: Unleash new levels of creativity and productivity with Galaxy AI tools alongside a titanium frame and amazing 100x zoom.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A35 5G (8GB+128GB - Awesome Lilac)
specs: 6.6-inch FHD+ Super AMOLED 120Hz
Exynos 1380 processor
50MP OIS Triple camera
IP67 Dust and Water Resistant
products.description: High-value smartphone with premium design, glass back, Knox Security, and outstanding water resistance.

products.name: Spigen Tough Armor Case (for iPhone 15 Pro Max)
specs: Dual-layer protection made of flexible TPU and rigid PC
Air Cushion Technology for shock absorption
Built-in kickstand for hands-free viewing
products.description: Sleek yet durable case providing top-tier military-grade protection for your expensive iPhone.

products.name: Apple 20W USB-C Power Adapter (Original)
specs: Fast charging support for compatible iPhone models
Recommended for charging iPad Pro and iPad Air
Pairs with USB-C to Lightning / USB-C cables
products.description: Original Apple 20W power adapter for safe, fast, and highly reliable charging of Apple ecosystem products.

reviews.comment: Realme 11 x display acche bhav mein yahan per milta Hai ekadam kam Dam mein aap bhi aaiae aapke Parivar ka bhi kuchh bhi mobile related work rahega to yahi per aana Sanjay mobile store.
reviews.replyFromOwner: Shukriya Abhishek ji! Aapke parivar ka koi bhi kaam ho, hum hamesha saste aur ache daam mein original display bitaenge.

reviews.comment: Realme 12 x display yahan se repair Kiya acche rate mein good condition wah bhi airport DGCA office ke saamne hi hai.
reviews.replyFromOwner: Thank you Rohit! Yes, our shop is directly opposite the DGCA office on Sahar Road, extremely easy to find.

reviews.comment: Vivo y200 original display folder yaha se repair karwaya affordable rate me
reviews.replyFromOwner: Dhananjay ji, bahuta dhanyawad! Hum 100% genuine folder fittings hi dete hain taki organic resolution bani rahe.

reviews.comment: Realme 8 display achcha quality ka milta Hai yahan per acche rate mein aap bhi yah shop ek bar TRY kijiye.
reviews.replyFromOwner: Thank you Prasad bhai! Hamesha try karne ke liye aate rahiye, standard rates hi milenge hamesha.

reviews.comment: Power bank yaha se liya 12000mah ka rs 999 me
reviews.replyFromOwner: Thanks Sweeta! 12000mAh original backup power bank high grade output ke saath dukan par humesha live milta hai.

bookings.issueDescription: Cracked the screen while getting off the local train at Andheri station.

timeline.notes: Assigned to senior hardware technician Anil.
Inspecting frame damage and connector cables.

bookings.issueDescription: Battery health drops to 74% and drains complete charge in 3 hours.

timeline.notes: Original Apple layout high capacity battery installed. All tests passed. Device ready for pickup.

orders.shippingAddress: Flat 202, Gokul Heights, Sahar Road, Andheri East, Mumbai 400069

notifications.title: Welcome to Sanjay Mobile Store
notifications.body: Your high-fidelity local repair partner in Andheri East, Mumbai. Book screen, battery, or software repairs now.
